notes: Canonical challenger composed from LongContextSeq2048 training, FP16Embed_WD3600 export handling, and SlidingWindowEval scoring. COMPILE_MODE, COMPUTE_DTYPE, and SDPA_BACKEND are H100 execution defaults, not new model-side levers.
purpose: First manual H100 truth run intended to beat SlidingWindowEval with a strict composition of accepted levers.
success_criteria: Beat SlidingWindowEval at post-export val_bpb=1.19250007 without exceeding 16,000,000 artifact bytes.
